task_completion.description: Navigate to the Inputs page in Emoncms
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the Emoncms web interface with the 'Inputs' section active. The 'heatpump' input should be visible under the 'home' node.

task_completion.description: Open the process configuration for the heatpump input
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog or page for configuring 'Input processes' is open, specifically indicating it is for the 'heatpump' input (often accessed by clicking a wrench/spanner icon).

task_completion.description: Select the 'Log to feed' process type
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Add Process section, the process type dropdown has 'Log to feed' selected.

task_completion.description: Enter the new feed name 'Heat Pump Log'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text input field for the new feed name contains exactly 'Heat Pump Log'.

task_completion.description: Verify the process has been added to the input
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Log to feed' process targeting the 'Heat Pump Log' feed is listed in the active processes for the 'heatpump' input, or the main Inputs page shows an updated process indicator for the 'heatpump' input.

integrity.description: The agent used the Emoncms web interface to configure the process
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Emoncms web UI in a browser, rather than using terminal commands like curl to API endpoints.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify the database directly
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL/MariaDB queries (e.g., UPDATE input SET processList=...) are visible.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Emoncms application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows http://localhost and the Emoncms interface is genuine.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring the 'heatpump' input (under the 'home' node) in Emoncms at http://localhost. The agent must add a 'Log to feed' process (process code 1) to this input and create a new feed named 'Heat Pump Log'. The initial state has no processes configured for this input. The agent should use the Emoncms web interface to complete this task.
